overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an astronaut navigating through a dense asteroid field in deep space. The character uses a jetpack to maneuver between floating rocks, lands on a large asteroid, and flies toward a massive white planet, with a bright star illuminating the scene.

agents.ego_description: floating weightlessly through the asteroid field, drifting toward a large asteroid with a bright star in the background

entered.detail: bright white star providing direct illumination from the upper center of the frame
various sized gray rocks floating throughout the space environment
large rocky asteroid that the character is approaching

segments.scene_description: The character floats weightlessly through a dense asteroid field in deep space. A bright star shines intensely from the center background, illuminating the scattered gray asteroids of various sizes that drift around the scene.

events.description: character lands on the surface of the large gray asteroid and begins moving across it

agents.ego_description: approaching and landing on the large asteroid, then traversing its rocky uneven surface

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and lands on the large gray asteroid, moving across its rough, gravel-like surface. The bright star remains visible in the background, now partially obscured by the asteroid's bulk as the camera follows the character's movement across the rocky terrain.

events.description: character activates jetpack thrusters, creating white exhaust plumes, and launches off the asteroid surface
large white planet comes into view on the left side of the frame

agents.ego_description: using jetpack thrusters to navigate between asteroids, leaving the large asteroid behind and moving toward the newly visible planet

entered.detail: massive pale white planet or moon that enters the frame from the left, dominating the background

segments.scene_description: The character activates their jetpack thrusters, leaving the asteroid behind in a burst of white exhaust. They fly through the asteroid field, and a massive white planet gradually comes into view on the left, providing a new celestial backdrop to the scene.

events.description: character flies past the large white planet, which moves from left to right in the frame as the camera continues forward

agents.ego_description: continuing to fly through the asteroid field with the large planet visible in the background, navigating between smaller rocks

segments.scene_description: The character continues flying through the asteroid field, passing the large white planet which now dominates the right side of the frame. The bright star remains visible in the distance as the character maneuvers between smaller asteroids in the deep space environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a dense asteroid field that transitions from weightless drifting to a planetary approach. It begins with the character floating through scattered gray asteroids illuminated by an intense, central star. As the camera follows, the character descends to land on a large asteroid, moving across its rough, gravel-like surface while the star becomes partially obscured by the rocky bulk. The scene then shifts as the character activates jetpack thrusters in a burst of white exhaust, leaving the asteroid behind to reveal a massive white planet emerging on the left. Finally, the camera tracks the character as they maneuver through smaller drifting rocks, with the white planet now dominating the frame alongside the distant, shining star.
